title: Easy Craft of Chainmail Armor
description: With this mod you can craft the Chainmail Armor
body:
With this mod you can finally craft the Chainmail Armor. 

In addition I have added a new recipe to create the chain to balance the difference in crafting cost between chanmail armor and iron armor.

***The mod is compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)***

***CHAIN***  
![Example of recipe of Chain](https://i.imgur.com/SCcz4du.png)

***HELMET***  
![Example of recipe of HELMET](https://i.imgur.com/oOlrMAM.png)

***CHESTPLATE***  
![Example of recipe of CHESTPLATE](https://i.imgur.com/qKyKBN6.png)

***LEGGINGS***  
![Example of recipe of LEGGINGS](https://i.imgur.com/obNpl5e.png)

***BOOTS***  
![Example of recipe of BOOTS](https://i.imgur.com/ARH6Ep8.png)
